view.title: Validate persona scenario #2

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence regarding the enforcement of quiet hours.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The step aimed to validate the scenario of 'Quiet hours (no SMS 10pm-8am)', but the evidence does not confirm whether this restriction is actively enforced during the booking process. While the expected result states that the scenario behavior should be confirmed or produce a failure report, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates how the system handles notifications during the specified quiet hours. Therefore, the validation cannot be conclusively determined.
